questionHtml:
What can be seen in a plan diagram of a leaf?


A.  Spongy cells and surface of the upper epidermis

B.  Chloroplasts in palisade cells and position of waxy cuticle

C.  Vascular bundles and thickness of palisade mesophyll

D.  Guard cells and distribution of air spaces

meta.title: What can be seen in a plan diagram of a leaf? A. Spongy cells and surface of the upper epidermis B. Chloroplasts in palisade cells and position of waxy cuticle C. Vascular bundles
breadcrumbLabels: B3.1.8. Distribution of tissues in a leaf
